reference: Hi, welcome to HCMI. I really appreciate your concern. A fungal infection of the hair could be the cause, or it could be due to age as well. If it is a confirmed fungal infection, then it can be managed with an anti-fungal shampoo like 'selenium.' If this is a geriatric problem, then not much can be done. I hope this information helps.
text: Hi, welcome to HEMI. I really appreciate your concern. A fungal infection of the hair could be the cause, or be due to age as well. If it is a confirmed fungal infection, then it can be managed with an antifungal shampoo like Selenium. If this is a geriatric problem, then not much can be done. I hope this information helps.
